message:
bd-rhd4 frame: add dropna thresh semantics for rows and columns

Implement pandas-style threshold-based missing-value filtering for DataFrame:
- Add `DataFrame::dropna_with_threshold(thresh, subset)` for axis=0 semantics
- Add `DataFrame::dropna_columns_with_threshold(thresh, subset)` for axis=1 semantics

Behavior:
- Keeps rows/columns with at least `thresh` non-missing values in the selected scope
- Reuses existing subset resolution paths for fail-closed selector validation
- Preserves existing `dropna`/`dropna_with_options` and `dropna_columns_with_options` APIs unchanged

Tests:
- Row-threshold keep/drop behavior
- Row-threshold subset-scoped behavior
- Column-threshold keep/drop behavior
- Column-threshold subset-scoped behavior

Docs:
- Update FEATURE_PARITY null/NaN row to include `thresh` support for axis=0 and axis=1

Validation:
- rch exec -- cargo fmt --check
- rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-frame
- rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings
- UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --only=rust crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs

files.patch:
@@ -16,7 +16,7 @@
 | Index alignment and selection | in_progress | `FP-P2C-001`/`FP-P2C-002` packet suites green with gate validation and RaptorQ sidecars; `FP-P2C-010` adds series/dataframe filter-head-loc-iloc basics; `FP-P2D-025` extends DataFrame loc/iloc row+column selector parity; `FP-P2D-026` adds DataFrame head/tail parity; `FP-P2D-027` adds DataFrame head/tail negative-`n` parity; core DataFrame ordering APIs `sort_index`/`sort_values` now implemented in `fp-frame`; full selector+ordering matrix still pending |
 | GroupBy core aggregates | in_progress | `FP-P2C-005` and `FP-P2C-011` suites green (`sum`/`mean`/`count` core semantics); broader aggregate matrix still pending |
 | Join/merge/concat core | in_progress | `FP-P2C-004` and `FP-P2C-006` suites green for series-level join/concat semantics; `FP-P2D-014` covers DataFrame merge + axis=0 concat matrix; `FP-P2D-028` adds DataFrame concat axis=1 outer alignment parity; `FP-P2D-029` adds axis=1 `join=inner` parity; `FP-P2D-030` adds axis=0 `join=inner` shared-column parity; `FP-P2D-031` adds axis=0 `join=outer` union-column/null-fill parity; `FP-P2D-032` adds axis=0 `join=outer` first-seen column-order (`sort=False`) parity; `FP-P2D-039` adds DataFrame merge `how='cross'` semantics (including suffix/indicator and invalid key/index guard rails); full DataFrame merge/concat contracts still pending |
-| Null/NaN semantics | in_progress | `FP-P2C-007` suite green for `dropna`/`fillna`/`nansum`; `fp-frame` now also exposes Series/DataFrame `isna`/`notna` plus `isnull`/`notnull` aliases, DataFrame `fillna`, optioned row-wise `dropna` (`how='any'/'all'` with column `subset` selectors), and optioned column-wise `dropna` (`axis=1`, row-label `subset`, plus default `dropna_columns()`); full nanops matrix still pending |
+| Null/NaN semantics | in_progress | `FP-P2C-007` suite green for `dropna`/`fillna`/`nansum`; `fp-frame` now also exposes Series/DataFrame `isna`/`notna` plus `isnull`/`notnull` aliases, DataFrame `fillna`, optioned row-wise `dropna` (`how='any'/'all'` + `thresh` with column `subset` selectors), and optioned column-wise `dropna` (`axis=1`, `how='any'/'all'` + `thresh`, row-label `subset`, plus default `dropna_columns()`); full nanops matrix still pending |
 | Core CSV ingest/export | in_progress | `FP-P2C-008` suite green for CSV round-trip core cases; `fp-io` now supports optioned file-based CSV reads (`read_csv_with_options_path`) and JSON `records`/`columns`/`split`/`index` orients (including split index-label roundtrip); broader parser/formatter parity matrix pending |
 | Storage/dtype invariants | in_progress | `FP-P2C-009` suite green for dtype invariant checks; broader dtype coercion/storage matrix pending |
